title: PeacefulPlus
body:
PeacefulPlus is designed for peaceful survival enthusiasts who prefer a tranquil gaming experience without the constant threat of hostile mobs. This datapack takes an approach by transforming traditionally aggressive creatures into passive and friendly counterparts, allowing players to explore the world without fear.

With PeacefulPlus, players no longer need to sacrifice valuable resources and mob drops by playing in peaceful mode. The datapack seamlessly converts mobs such as zombies, skeletons, and creepers into harmless creatures that won't pose a threat. Imagine encountering friendly zombies willing to trade, or playful skeletons that engage in friendly banter!

Crafting, building, and exploring become even more enjoyable as the tension dissipates, leaving room for creativity and peace of mind. Engage in the art of farming without worrying about hostile raids, or build stunning structures without the fear of creeper explosions. PeacefulPlus empowers players to fully embrace their imaginative side without the need for constant combat.

Please provide feedback, report any bugs, or suggest new features! By leaving comments and engaging with the community, you can actively contribute to the ongoing development and improvement of the datapack.
